nasb.text: The sound of a report! Behold, it comes— A great commotion out of the land of the north— To make the cities of Judah A desolation, a haunt of jackals.

esv.text: A voice, a rumor! Behold, it comes!— a great commotion out of the north country to make the cities of Judah a desolation, a lair of jackals.

cnv.text: 聽哪！有風聲傳來， 有大騷動從北方之地而來， 要使猶大的城市荒涼， 成為野狗的巢穴。

ccb.text: 听啊，有消息传来， 喧嚣的敌军从北方冲来， 要使犹大的城邑荒凉， 沦为豺狼的巢穴。
